products.name: drygear® Strain Wave Gear
products.descriptor: Compact lubrication-free strain wave gearbox for robotic joints

evidence.snippet:
drygear® Strain wave gear | size 17 with Nema 17 motor
drygear® Strain wave gear | size 17 with Nema 17 motor

**drygear strain wave gear with NEMA17**
*   The strain wave gear convinces by its very compact and lightweight design
*   Available transmission: 28:1
*   Max. output torque: 4.0Nm
*   NEMA17: this little motor has impressive torque and high speeds. It reliably handles fast movements of smaller loads.

products.name: dryve Motor Controllers (D1/D2/D3)
products.descriptor: Plug-and-play motor controller family for DC, stepper, and BLDC motors

evidence.snippet:
Control system
1 x D3
![dropdown](/_catalog/icons/igus-icon-arrow-down.svg)

To produce sustainable coffee capsules made of wood, a drylin two-axis line robot is used with a dryve D1 control system. The reliable, affordable automated solution helps us fit up to 43 coffee capsules per minute with an exterior circumferential seal of natural rubber.

unresolved_questions: No product-specific NDAA Section 848/889 or Blue UAS compliance claims found in any of the 40 fetched pages; all 15 products carry unknown for both fields.
iRC Robot Control Software: dedicated product page was skipped (skipped_budget); product confirmed only via navigation links across multiple pages.

dryve Motor Controllers D1/D2/D3: D1 confirmed from a user-story mention in resource-0033, D3 from the complete-package SKU page (resource-0041); D2 only inferred from an over-60-word nav line in resource-0021 that could not be cited directly.
CF112 data cable: confirmed only from a boats application page (resource-0042); dedicated chainflex data-cables category page was skipped (skipped_class_budget).
igus has a very large catalog (1,113 skipped/failed pages); only the 15 prioritized products were classified.
